name: ChatGLM3-6B
license: Apache-2.0 (code); ChatGLM3-6B Model License for weights (free for research; free commercial use after registration)
archDisplay: Dense Transformer (GLM, Multi-Query Attention, SwiGLU, 28 layers)
note: Third-gen 6B model adding native function calling, code interpreter and agent tool use; strongest sub-10B base model on its release benchmarks.
